summary: Tested dynamic per-product trade_discount and credit_back_rate implementation. All backend APIs correctly return both fields. Frontend correctly uses per-product/per-collection rates for price calculations and cart item storage.

GET /api/tiles/collections - trade_disco.details: Returns trade_discount field for each collection (defaults to 5 from TRADE_DISCOUNT_DEFAULT)

GET /api/tiles/collections - credit_back.details: Returns credit_back_rate field for each collection (defaults to 2 from TRADE_CREDIT_BACK_DEFAULT)

GET /api/tiles/collection/{series_name}.details: Returns trade_discount field at collection level
Returns credit_back_rate field at collection level

GET /api/tiles/products/{slug}/tier-pric.details: Returns trade_discount field in tier pricing response, uses per-product value from DB when no query param provided
Returns credit_back_rate field in tier pricing response

Collection Cards - Per-Collection trade_.details: TileCollectionsPage.js uses collection.trade_discount (per-collection rate from API) for getProductTradePrice(), not account-level default

Collection Cards - Credit Back Badge (Tr.details: Shows 'Extra 2% Credit Back' badge below price for trade users (32 badges found on page)

Product Detail Page - Credit Back Badge.details: Shows 'Extra 2% Credit Back' badge near Add to Cart button for trade users

Cart - Per-Item trade_discount.details: CollectionDetailPage passes productTradeDiscount to cart items. TileCartPage uses item.trade_discount for 'Saved vs retail' calculation

Cart - Per-Item credit_back_rate.details: CollectionDetailPage passes creditBackRate to cart items. TileCartPage uses item.credit_back_rate for 'Credit Back Earned' calculation

Cart - Saved vs Retail Section.details: Shows 'Saved vs retail £6.04 - That's 21% off the retail inc. VAT price' for trade users, using per-item trade_discount

Cart - Credit Back Section.details: Shows 'Credit Back Earned £0.46 on ex. VAT product total' for trade users, using per-item credit_back_rate

critical_code_review_comments: Implementation correctly reads per-product trade_discount and credit_back_rate from DB, falling back to global defaults (TRADE_DISCOUNT_DEFAULT=5, TRADE_CREDIT_BACK_DEFAULT=2) when not set
Frontend correctly stores per-item rates in cart items and uses them for calculations instead of account-level defaults
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - localStorage simulation used for testing. Products in preview DB use default rates (trade_discount=5, credit_back_rate=2) since per-product values are not set.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic per-product trade_discount and credit_back_rate fully implemented. APIs return both fields for collections, collection detail, and tier pricing. Frontend uses per-collection rates for price display on collection cards, and stores per-item rates in cart for calculations. Default values (trade_discount=5, credit_back_rate=2) are used when per-product values are not set in DB. The bulk-tier-update endpoint in supplier_sync.py can save per-product trade_discount and credit_back_rate.

implementation_notes.backend_flow: tiles.py reads per-product trade_discount and credit_back_rate from tiles/supplier_products collections, falls back to business_rules.py defaults
implementation_notes.frontend_flow: TileCollectionsPage uses collection.trade_discount for getProductTradePrice(). CollectionDetailPage stores productTradeDiscount and creditBackRate from API, passes to cart. TileCartPage uses per-item rates for calculations.
implementation_notes.admin_flow: supplier_sync.py bulk-tier-update endpoint saves trade_discount and credit_back_rate per product
